name: @cs2helper/cs2-dedicated-server
description: Docker image for Counter-Strike 2 dedicated server (steamcmd + volume install).

scripts.docker:run: docker run --rm -it -p 27015:27015/udp -p 27015:27015/tcp -p 27020:27020/udp -p 28080:28080/tcp -e SRCDS_TOKEN -e GSI_URI -e CS2_STATUS_HTTP_USER=admin -e CS2_STATUS_HTTP_PASSWORD=changeme -v cs2-dedicated-data:/opt/cs2 cs2helper/cs2-dedicated-server:local
